name: Clicking a ring segment reveals that iteration's detail card
description: When a user clicks a colored arc segment of the iteration ring, a detail card appears below the ring describing that iteration; clicking the same segment again dismisses it.

planSteps.description: Click a colored arc segment of the circular iteration ring
Verify a detail card appears directly below the ring, inside a bordered panel, stating the iteration number, a PASS or FAIL verdict, the feature description, and the maker name
Click the same arc segment of the ring again
Verify the detail card below the ring is dismissed and no longer present
